case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. VS. JAMES CHILCOTT ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT CHILCOTT, JAMES DOES 1 TO 15, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-06-2016
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 16224019)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-23-2016 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-23-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
